page_content:
GEOG653 Spatial Analysis (3 Credits)

Methods of spatial analysis including measuring aspects of geometric features and identifying spatial patterns of geospatial objects that are represented as point, line, network, areal data, and 3-D surfaces. Prerequisite: GEOG579; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.

Restriction: Must be in Geospatial Information Sciences (Master's) program; or must be in the Geospatial Information Sciences (Graduate Certificate) program.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
